untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of VX front contract price vs VIX spot price with dynamic threshold (0.1 points × days to settlement). Available indicators do not include: (1) VX front contract price, (2) days to settlement calculation, (3) dynamic roll return threshold. India_vix is used as a proxy but this is a fundamental mismatch. The signal also requires paired position sizing (0.3906 VX contracts + 1 ES contract) which cannot be expressed in the condition structure. Days-to-settlement is a time-dependent calculation not available as a pre-computed indicator.
translation_notes: This pairs trading strategy exploits mean reversion in volatility futures using roll return (backwardation vs contango). The core logic requires real-time calculation of: (1) VX front contract pricing vs spot VIX, (2) days remaining to contract settlement, (3) dynamic threshold adjustment. These are not available in the standard indicator set. Used india_vix as a weak proxy for spot volatility but this fundamentally misses the VX front/spot spread mechanic. The 1-day hold and position sizing cannot be captured in the standard condition schema.
